title: iLEAP Certification Revocation Record
description: An immutable record of the revocation of a previously granted iLEAP certification. The file is named after the UUID of the certification being revoked ({certification_id}.json).

certification_id.description: UUID of the certification being revoked. Must match the 'uuid' field in the corresponding certification record. Also used as this file's name ({certification_id}.json).

revocation_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which the certification was revoked.

reason.description: 'sfc_cert_lapsed': provider did not renew their SFC Certification. 'conformance_lost': provider's implementation no longer conforms to the iLEAP Technical Specifications. 'voluntary_withdrawal': provider voluntarily withdrew from certification. 'administrative': revoked for administrative reasons.

notes.description: Optional free-text explanation providing further context for the revocation.
